TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Cicala'ay, title = Cicala'ay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cicala'ay} }

S.FORM: = Cicala'ay = Gaga mniq Taytung Cusangsyang ka alang Cicala'ay. 537 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,368 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 23% niqan 309 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 77% niqan 1,059 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis18%, Bunun2%, Paiwan1%, ni rahuq na o1%.
S.PHON: = ʦiʦala'aj = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ʦusaŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ ʦiʦala'aj. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, bunun*%, paiwan*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Cicala'ay = Gaga mniq Taytung Cusangsyang ka alang Cicala'ay. 537 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,368 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 23% niqan 309 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 77% niqan 1,059 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis18%, Bunun2%, Paiwan1%, ni rahuq na o1%.
S.PHON: = ʦiʦala'aj = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ʦusaŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ ʦiʦala'aj. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, bunun*%, paiwan*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
